landing.page_title: Fulply — Get clients who actually need a new website
landing.meta_description: Find businesses from Google Maps that need a website redesign. Score leads and generate personalised outreach emails with AI.

hero.subheadline: Google Maps businesses scored by potential. Personalized email draft in one click.

lead_preview.title: See it in action
lead_preview.subtitle: This is what your search results look like — analyzed, scored, ready to contact.
lead_preview.mock_lead1_ai_note: Low design score (32/100): extremely outdated visual design with tiled background, mismatched colors, and layout typical of early 2000s — no visual hierarchy, low-quality images. Low copywriting score (44/100): basic list of services with no value proposition or differentiation from competitors; text is dense and difficult to scan. Copyright year 2015 indicates the site has not been updated in over 10 years. Contact information (phone) is visible but not prominently styled as a CTA — no contact button or form present.
lead_preview.mock_email_body:
Hi,

I came across your website johnson-plumbing.co.uk and noticed one thing that's probably costing you customers.

Most people search for a plumber on their phone these days — and your site doesn't display well on mobile. A customer who sees a broken page won't call you; they'll call the next plumber in the results.

I'd be happy to show you what your site could look like after a fix. Want me to send a free preview?

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready.
pricing.trial_cta: Start free — no credit card required.

cta.title: Start getting clients today.
cta.subtitle: No credit card. Just sign in.

q3.q: What languages and countries does Fulply work in?
q3.a: Fulply works anywhere Google Maps has business listings — which is virtually every country. Emails can be generated in any language based on the website's language or your custom AI instructions.

q4.q: How long does the analysis take?
q4.a: It depends on the number of businesses found. As a rough guide, analysing 50 websites takes about 5 minutes.

q5.q: Are the business listings up to date?
q5.a: Yes. Every search fetches data directly from Google Maps in real time, so you always get current listings.

q6.q: How does the AI generate the email draft?
q6.a: The AI has access to identified website issues, analysis notes, and business information. It doesn't write technically — it translates problems into business language that makes sense to the recipient. You can also customise the tone and style with your own AI instructions.

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.subtitle: Three steps from search to outreach.

1.title: You enter your industry and location
1.description: For example, plumber London — Fulply instantly finds relevant businesses from Google Maps.

2.title: We audit their websites
2.description: We run a technical and visual analysis and identify conversion issues. Each lead gets scored.

3.title: Personalized email drafts
3.description: AI writes an outreach text tailored specifically to the weaknesses of the business's website. The concept automatically transfers to your email client for you to review and send.

error.ai_note: Page contains no content. It has likely never existed. Consider redirecting visitors to a working URL.
